introSection: Shongololo is a kiddie roller coaster located at Gold Reef City in Gauteng, South Africa. The ride is a Wacky Worm model. "Shongololo" is Afrikaans for "Millipede".
fullText: Shongololo is a kiddie roller coaster located at Gold Reef City in Gauteng, South Africa. The ride is a Wacky Worm model. "Shongololo" is Afrikaans for "Millipede".
